examples: How can I be a beautiful skating star in black hockey skates and a puffy old snowsuit?
So I put on my red snowsuit and green boots.
If you design your kid's Halloween costume to fit over a snowsuit, you live in Ontario.
The press was at Newton City Hall flashing photos of Claudia in her snowsuit.
Assange was dressed in a gray full-body snowsuit, and he had with him a small entourage.
